title: Dekton 3PC Magnetic Tool Set, Stainless Steel Magnetic Tray, Telescopic Magnetic Pick-Up (125mm to 490mm), Adjustable Inspection Mirror for Hobbies, Home, Garage & Workshop
features: Versatile Magnetic Tray: The stainless steel magnetic tray measures 64mm x 93mm x 13.8mm, providing a reliable space for holding screws, bolts, and small parts during your projects. Its strong magnetic base ensures that your items stay secure and within reach, minimizing the risk of loss while working.

Telescopic Magnetic Pick-Up Tool: This handy tool extends from 125mm to an impressive 490mm, allowing you to reach tight spaces effortlessly. The ergonomic pocket clip ensures convenient storage when not in use. With a powerful magnetic head, it easily retrieves metal objects, making it perfect for home repairs, automotive tasks, or workshop projects.

Adjustable Inspection Mirror: Featuring a telescopic design that extends from 170mm to 485mm, this mirror helps you inspect hard-to-see areas. With a mirror diameter of 31mm, it provides a clear view of tight spaces, ideal for maintenance tasks on machinery and equipment.

Essential for Various Applications: Whether you're a DIY enthusiast, hobbyist, or professional, this tool set is perfect for inspection and maintenance. Ideal for home, office, garage, and workshop use, it simplifies tasks like checking behind appliances or under furniture.

Durable and Reliable: Constructed with high-quality materials, each tool in this set is designed for longevity and consistent performance. The robust design ensures they can withstand regular use, making them a valuable addition to your toolkit.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience. Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations. All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide. DEKTON 3PC Magnetic Tool Set Ideal for inspection and maintenance of equipment and machinery Stainless steel magnetic tray: 64mm X 93mm X 13.8mm Telescopic magnetic pick-up with pocket clip: extends from 125mm to 460mm Telescopic adjustable inspection mirror with pocket clip: extends from 170mm to 485mm, mirror diameter 31mm.
